calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN L. DAHM OF COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS, TEL. NO. 1-415-989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is Continued on the Court's own motion to November 4, 2016. This matter will be heard with the Law & Motion calendar at 9:30 a.m.

Judge Pro Tem: Greg Call; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Acknowledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment-Full Made In Error Ccp Section 473 And Ccp Section 1008
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorneys PLC (415-989-4730) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion To Vacate Acknowledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment-Full Made In Error CCP Section 473 And CCP Section 1008 is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ALIGN T3ECHNOLOGY, INC's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is taken off calendar. Satisfaction of judgment, fully satisfied filed by Plaintiff on June 7, 2016. Judge Pro-tem: Bruce Highman ; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
